name: gen-meta-skills
description: Personal skills marketplace for Coding Agents: project structure guides, development workflows, and meta-skills

interface.shortDescription: Workflow skills for project structure, context control, remote ops, orchestration, and skill review.
interface.longDescription: GenMetaSkills packages reusable agent workflow skills for NutShell project structure, clean context delivery, remote sudo handoffs, teammate orchestration, and marketplace admission review.
defaultPrompt: Use nutshell-develop to orient this workspace.
Use context-filter to clean this handoff.
Use meta-skill-check to review this skill.
